title: MiningFatigueFix
description: A mod that fixes Mining Fatigue appearing when you join a modded world.
body:
A mod that stops Mining Fatigue from constantly stopping you from mining when you join a world. This mod will not stop mining fatigue otherwise, so guardians and stuff won't be broken. You might have mining fatigue for the first 2 ticks, that's how the mod stops mining fatigue from starting at the beginning.
I have yet to test the mod with servers, so if someone could do that that would be wonderful.
